# Integral Stocks

> Beginner-friendly stock market dashboard with live quotes, interactive charts, AI insights that explain why stocks move, bite-sized lessons, financial news, sector heatmaps, an economic calendar, and a multiplayer paper-trading simulator.

Integral Stocks helps new investors understand the stock market. AI insights explain the reasons behind daily price movements, short lessons teach the basics, and a risk-free simulator lets users practice trading.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Learning path, bite-sized investing lessons, glossary search, and live market sections.
- [Stocks](/stocks): Live quotes, interactive charts, AI insights, watchlists, and news by category (markets, tech, crypto, IPOs, earnings).
- [Stock detail](/stocks/aapl): Per-ticker page with live price, chart, AI-generated explanation of recent movement, and headlines (e.g. /stocks/aapl, /stocks/tsla, /stocks/nvda).
- [News](/news): Breaking financial news organized by sector and topic.
- [Start Here](/start): Orientation guide for first-time investors.
- [Screeners](/screener): Curated screeners — top gainers, losers, most active — with sortable columns and price filters.
- [Calendar](/calendar): Personal market calendar for earnings dates, IPOs, dividends, and macro events.
- [Trading Simulator](/sim): Multiplayer paper-trading game with live prices, leaderboards, market/limit/stop orders, and shareable join codes.
- [Watchlist](/watchlist): Personal list of tracked symbols.

## Learn

- [Stock basics](/learn/basics): Plain-English introduction to stocks, shares, and how markets work.
- [Chart patterns](/learn/patterns): How to read common price chart patterns.
- [Indicators](/learn/indicators): Explanations of common technical indicators.

## About

- [About](/about): What Integral Stocks is and who it's for.
- [FAQ](/faq): Frequently asked questions.
- [Data sources](/data-sources): Where quotes, news, and AI insights come from.
- [Disclaimer](/disclaimer): Educational use and not financial advice.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch.

## Optional

- [Sign in](/auth): Account access for the simulator and personal watchlist.
